name: omnicom
description: Omnichannel communication platform with Telegram (personal account) integration

scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "3006,4000,4099 | ForEach-Object { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:db: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:1317@localhost:5432/omnicom?schema=public npx --workspace @omnicom/api prisma db push --skip-generate
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env API_PORT=4000 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:1317@localhost:5432/omnicom?schema=public REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3006 npm run start:dev --workspace @omnicom/api
scripts.dev:web: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000 PORT=3006 npm run dev --workspace @omnicom/web
scripts.dev:local: npm run dev:stop && npm run build:shared && npm run dev:db && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @omnicom/shared && npm run build --workspace @omnicom/api && npm run build --workspace @omnicom/web
